channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... — 39 replies — 156.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"...

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-04-06 09:11 UTC

OP

So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... shouldn't we have a look at what he told us *not* to buy?

He tried very hard to steer us away from one coin in particular back in 2018.

They wanted you out.

Early replies (first 3)

62077049
well he was right about raiblocks

62077089
>>62077049
Only in the sense that he was "right" about LINK. It's price did go up, yet it achieved nothing. Sergey met Trump and still nobody cares about smartcontracts. LINK had every chance to succeed but failed.

>Controlled opposition is a political or strategic tactic where a governing body, organization, or elite group secretly supports, infiltrates, or manages its own opposition to manipulate dissent, control narratives, and prevent real challenges to the status quo

A functional stateless currency would challenge the status quo, and now it's been "over 5 years under the radar".

Watch how long this thread stays up.

62077098
>>62077000
>>62077049
>>62077089
Bullish for XRP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62077784
>>62077648
Hey remember when the Solana founders posted all that cryptic shit before their coin melted faces? Remember when Vitalik left all those breadcrumbs for us right before ETHs supermoon?

Yea me fucking neither. Fuck all this Da Vinci code bullshit cuz all the real projects didnt need it. Link needs to either shit or get off the pot, im tired of waiting.

62077915
>>62077784
you sound upset
I found it
>>62077648
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59792278

62077949
>>62077915
1999-2004

62078336
rip

62078361
ebin glubo hed jestar :DDD
wen pömp spruoölooo??!

62078397
>>62077784
good post.

62078415
>>62077915
>>62077648
>https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59792278
geeze you guys are schizos lmao

62078437
>>62077784
the project works as intended. blame the market participants not treating the coin like a stock. the issue is people don't hold longer than 24 hours anymore and only buy trending coins.

62078484
is XRB supposed to be XRP ?

62078586
>>62078484
Newfag

62078618
>>62077089
>yet it achieved nothing
Chainlink is among the very top in both crypto adoption and non-crypto adoption. By a very wide margin.

You're worryingly low iq.

62078620
>>62078618
The only thing that's "worryingly low" is LINK's price xD

The only thing its adopted are cuckolds online like you

62078663
>>62077915
Is Ari one of us?

62078703
HOLY SHIT

By sheer chance I happened to be watching Sunny today, "The gang finds a dumpster baby", and recognised one of the frames Asslarper used (pic related).

In this episode, Dennis (AB's avatar) convinces an activist to CHAINLINK himself to a tree, then LITERALLY KEKS him.

Now do you believe me?

Inverse Assblaster; what did he tell you was useless?

Raiblocks and Ripple.

Time is running out.

62078711
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62078735
He even admitted his intentions in one of his final posts.

This ARG goes DEEP.

62078857
>>62078703
everyone needs to see this

62078921
>>62078618
But didn't you originally intend to make money?
Or are you like a sportsball fan that pays the team regardless of outcome and don't share in the winnings?

62079599
>>62078703
cuckolds of crypto.

It was there the whole time.

62079836
>>62078703
There it is folks.

"Cuckolds of crypto" was planned all along.

If you're still holding LINK after seeing this... well, you deserve what's next.

62079965
>>62078735
Link was .30-.40 when he posted this.

62079978
>>62077648
You mean the schizo posts about the referenced world vs the whatever the fuck he called the “new world”

62080163
>>62077915
that's a lot of manufactured horseshit for
>be at the right place at the right time

62080436
>>62079836
pool's closed / thanks for keeping this a link board.

62080485
>>62077089
Thread's still up and likely will be for days because this is a dead board, the irony of you making fun of one group of shitcoin holders for invoking hidden lore/"its a sekret" terminology and doing the same thing in your thread, nobody fucking cares about xrp you boomer faggot.
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62080493
>12 pbtid
>about raiblocks
Hmmm

62080684
>>62080485
>this is a dead board
It's a dead site, dude. It was fucking swamped with non-whites years ago and they all just go to /b/, /v/ and /pol/ for their le epic psyops and bait threads. All the average intelligence white people that used to be on this website are gone. I dunno where they went. A lot to Twitter, I guess.

62080692
>>62080684
>twitter
Yeah I think so. I’m not smart but I am white and I can’t believe it but I spend a far more amount of time on x now than 4chins. I’ve been here every waking minute since 2011 and never thought this place could be so fucking boring and gay.

62080695
>>62080684
That's true, probably why adem feels so at home here.

62081569
>>62078703
Assblaster convinced /biz/ to CHAINLINK themselves to a SINGULAR TREE and then cuckolded them!

The cuckolds of crypto was planned out, years in advance.

item.title: Been around any wagies/normies lately? — 28 replies — 112.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Been around any wagies/normies lately?

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-04-06 09:19 UTC

OP

They are 100% DONE.

Completely and totally blackpilled, they make /pol/tards look like hyper motivated Supermen. The average wagecuck is a zombified corpse shuffling through life and just waiting to die, it's wild. The funniest part is what miniscule amount of energy they have left is used exclusively to hyper aggressively cope with other normalfags.

They all go through this weird dance where they "flex" on each other and put up a fabricated front that they are "doing well" while they all circle the toilet drain together. It makes it impossible to feel sorry for them as they continue to rack up debt and live miserable atomized lives.

Game over goyim

Early replies (first 3)

62080565
>>62080562
My favorite part about this system is that by not playing their "pretending to do well" game, you just save up as much as possible and make it to the other side of the K economy lol

62080574
>>62080562
Nigger I'm demoralized too. You have any fucking idea where you are?

62080580
>>62080562
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62080612
>>62080562
I’ve come to realize that everything is either

>a front
>elaborate wealth extraction scheme
>everyone is faking it


Atlas is a white guy in his late 40s in an upper middle management trade field w a slipped disk on his 2nd marriage.

62080799
>>62080612
the wealth extraction makes me so depressed god damn man

my entire gmail is scammers and ads, my phone book is scammers calling me from different numbers 20 times a day, everything you see everywhere is just an ad.. Im so fucking tired cant even pump gas without the little tv screen on the gas pump beaming ads into your brain 24/7

62080861
>>62080580
Basically only a small portion of people live in a monetarily actualized way. The rest are basically crippled semi humans and live a life of the equivalent of needing constant oxygen to survive

62080888
>>62080562
My office is unfortunately in the same building as a bunch of Union / factory wagies so yes.
Every break they get, they endlessly scroll their short-form video content on their phones and mouth breathe until it’s over. Young or old, it does not matter. Maybe 10% of them exercise free will in any visible form. It’s legitimately WALL-E tier.
Maybe my local wage slaves are still in a trance because they can still (barely) afford a modest house here. So they haven’t completely blackpilled, but they are hopelessly checked out. I’m stuck living some combination of Idiocracy and WALL-E if I go out in public.

62080891
>>62080799
> cant even pump gas without the little tv screen on the gas pump beaming ads into your brain 24/7

Magnets are your friend. Particularly when you just so happen to wear a magnet ring while pumping gas and trying to swipe left on the screen to dismiss the ad.
>oopsie whoopsie officer I didn't know my ring would do that
>I thought the ring was supposed to be "magnetizing" to women, not digital screens

62080921
>>62080562
Yea, I've noticed an uptick in unhealthy eating and doom spending where I work. People just buying things they can't afford and eating whatever they want like the end is coming soon. It takes mental effort to not feel that way.

62080933
>>62080612
When everything feels like a grift or a waste of time, it's as if buzzards are circling a corpse.

62080935
>>62080562
> They all go through this weird dance where they "flex" on each other and put up a fabricated front that they are "doing well"

It’s weird how normies do this. I guess they have to fake it to hold onto what little social status they have

62080946
what did this to them? ai? the files?

62080950
>>62080580

>Source: We asked 10 high rolling bettors

62081053
>>62080562
I'm like this ever since my life got destroyed 2-3 years ago. I was basically assigned a bunch of non-dischargeable debt, and now I'm a permentnat wagie unless I flee the country which im seriously thinking about doing.

62081124
>>62080799
Can't fucking stand the TV ads on gas pump, gotta find a way to disable them. Why aren't the joggers breaking those fucking things

62081304
total normgroid death

62081311
>>62080562
I'm tired of being a mid 30s incel ugly loser, so I've finally caved in and started fucking fat emo and goth chicks that are married and in open/poly relationships, because those types are always hitting me up.

62081333
4 months ago i stopped wageslaving because i wanted to have time to do the things that i want to do. Iam in the six figure hell. Now I dont see myself going back to waging. I kms if i go back to work or the day i run out of money. Sleeping and not having to deal with coworkers is pure heaven

62081344
>>62081333
I'm so sick I don't even want to kill myself, I just want to suffer. I'll probably die of a heart condition in my 30s or 40s anyways.

62081346
>>62081311
>so I've finally caved in and started fucking fat emo and goth chicks that are married and in open/poly relationships, because those types are always hitting me up.
kek i did this too

62081356
>>62081346
I'm actually not even a bad-looking dude, but I live in the middle of nowhere, so I'm competing with Chadvicular in the cities, so I have to travel like fucking Genghis Khan to get pussy.

62081360
>>62081356
I actually enjoyed the travel aspect of it. Visited place I'd never have gone to otherwise just for pussy.

62081363
>>62081360
That's a good way to look at it. Thanks for the confidence boost bro!

62081366
>>62081363
Anytime m8. And it is, I actually do feel serious about that. I remember exploring malls I'd never have gone to otherwise, restaurants I'd never go to otherwise, new areas, all a neat little adventure with the benefit of sex.
Sometimes the sex part wouldn't even happen but I liked exploring new places. If I didn't do that I'd have just lived my usual wagie life and gone nowhere.

62081398
>>62081366
You're right. I'm really looking forward to this summer!

62081519
>>62081311
>>62081346
what's this like?

62081553
>>62081366
>mutts explore malls like if they were monuments

62081576
>>62080950
More like 1 in 10 home owner

item.title: Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum? — 21 replies — 84.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum?

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-04-06 09:17 UTC

OP

Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum?
Only behind USDC and Tether

Does this give it more legitimacy or will most see through this mass marketing dust campaign?
Either way, it's not cheap to send your coin to 5 million people in a shill campaign.....

Early replies (first 3)

62077138
>>62077135
its totally legit saar, ape in lifesavings!

62077151
read pic
I bca finding out which "wrong-talk" did I type that our janitor is malding over

62077172
>>62077151
Airdropping a fresh coin would mess everything up, so if you're going to fork it anyways, why not make a new chain where the ETH FagFoundation can't make another update that fucks it all up with higher fees?

I agree there is a lot of hate-marketing out there giving bad optics, so many twitter accounts hating and shitting on RH and his coins daily and you just know it's all fueled by rage over their bags they're down bad on

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62077902
fuck off heart you gangster fuck

62077984
>>62077902
how is it so hard to find him? hes literally in estonia and probably hits up the luxury stores once a week lol

62078130
>>62077984
When X enabled location info for profiles last year his account showed south east asia.

>>62077902
fake news, all assault charges have been dropped
it was quite possibly completely made up just to get him on the interpol list since you can't be on there for non-violent crimes.

62078173
>>62077135
What’s the difference between pHEX, eHEX and HEX in ethereum? I can’t tell you because idgaf I’m all in pDAI niggers

62078189
>>62077172
>why not make a new chain where the ETH FagFoundation can't make another update that fucks it all up with higher fees?
because you're overcomplicating the project which was supposed to be pure game-theory of stakers vs LPers/ traders

now you have a shitshow that sent this to a -99% death chart
it's dead because of it

>Airdropping a fresh coin would mess everything up
it would mess NOTHING up
hex was an airdrop to bitcoin holders in the first place

62078192
>>62078173
see
this is what I mean
now you have the pDAI shitshow
you have pHEX, eHEX, pulseX
it's a fucking circus

richard fucking failed because he didn't listen to his own advice

62078714
>>62078130
sure thing mr goldstein

62078715
>>62078130
>non-violent
rape is a violent crime

62078740
>>62078173
pDAI to Dorra.

62078749
>>62077135
>3rd most wash-traded coin on ethereum
Ftfya

62079415
>>62078740
>pDAI to Dorra.
Pulsechain needs its own native stabefuck. $1 is inevitable

62079565
>>62079415
>>62078800
>>62078740
#WARNING

The fork of DAI on Pulsechain is exploited, it was minted for FREE by malicious exploiters who use bots to try their best to shill this token. They minted millions of it for free and want others to buy it from them. Do not buy.

The shill campaign is completely out of narratives now, it's just brainless shill slop

62080953
>>62079565
pDAI is going to a Dollar, but I don't know when.

62081000
>>62080953
The peggening is coming and there’s nothing hextards can do to stop it

62081294
It has the #2 spot in its sights
Holders vary by block explorer, Etherscan already shows HEX with more holders than USDC.....

62081572
>>62077135
yeah i still have my 101 that the scammer shoved into my address 100 years ago

item.title: >OIL crashing — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>OIL crashing

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-04-06 09:05 UTC

OP

>nothingburger confirmed

Early replies (first 3)

62080962
>>62080955
Biden was a better president

62080974
riggers

62081278
>>62080962
Ok snowflake

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081339
>>62080955
>-$3.20
>crashing

62081343
>>62080955
cope retard it's the monday morning peace treaty fake news pump like every week for the last 6 weeks

62081415
>>62080962
true
the best thing trump can do right now is call a draft, send all the reddit and facebook faggots plaguing this site to open the strait themselves then I'll forgive him

62081417
>>62080955
now do physical

62081423
>>62080974
>>62081343
>>62081415
>>62081417
fuck you fucking bidenkikes. trump is saying he's making a deal with iran and he extended the deadline to tuesday, that's bullish as fuck. this is going to be over soon.

62081436
>>62081423
I don't simp for politicians
now get in the strait

62081467
>>62080955
So we're back to February prices right?

62081506
>>62081423
iran is not accepting any deals.
enjoy the sandbox lol
us millennialchads will be fucking your oneitis

62081566
>>62081506
>us millennialchads will be fucking your oneitis
kek im stealing this one

item.title: Give it to me straight /biz/ — 21 replies — 24.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Give it to me straight /biz/

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-04-06 08:28 UTC

OP

I DCA $4 of BTC, $1 LINK, $1 XLM every day.

I currently have about
>0.02 BTC
>2,000 XRP
>2,000 XLM
>10 LINK
I have miscellaneous amounts of other crypto, but nothing worth putting in this thread unless it 1000x's. I do have a fat stack of PEPE tho.

Is the next 5 years going to pump my wallet to at least 100k? I just want enough that I can put a hefty down payment on a house, so I can let my elderly dog live out her last few years in a yard. If not, what should I do with my paycheck?

Early replies (first 3)

62078123
you need to save more, son

the world is divided into two groups. Those that have assets, and those that have a couple potatoes and a dream.

62078134
>>62078123
I am trying, I live in a very expensive state. I'm looking to move to a more affordable state, so far TN is the best looking option. That would help me save an additional 500 per month at least.

62078148
>>62078134
good. you have to love poverty so much that the cruel, ironic universe makes you wealthy

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078170
Youre not getting to 100k with chump change. Those days are gone, sorry to break it to you.

62078291
>>62078088
You are a retard for holding .2 BTC. If you put that all into link you’ll have close to 2,000 link which is going to easily be a make it stack by 2030. Link could literally dildo to $100 on any given day. And you’ll immediately have 200k. And it’ll probably be $3000 by 2030

62078299
>>62078291
I can't tell if this is fuddie irony anymore I'm so bvckbroken

62078303
>>62078299
Even if bitcoin goes to 300k (it isn’t) he will only have like 60k. 2,000 link he can have right now. And invest in the engine of the new financial system and be a top 15,000 holder. Versus buying a bitcoin which was last worth buying 11 fucking years ago

62078345
>>62078303
I wish I still had the same spirit

62078382
>>62078303
Why though? You can ask Claude Code or Google Gemini to code you an Oracle you can use for free that doesn't force you to use some mickey mouse token. The only bull case for LINK at this point is a globohomo one world government taking over with Sergei as the leader and if that happens the only thing you'll be able to spend your LINK on anyway is whether you want to buy gooified soi protein or upgrade to a bug-based protein slurry.

62079323
>>62078088
Daily DCA? why?

62080569
>>62079323
Guess I'm just doing time in market vs timing the market.

62080593
>>62078088
Just buy the shitcoin I made that has like 7 holders.

62080595
>>62080569
daily dca like that is actually very smart
you spread your risk perfectly evenly. you are always averaging out

62080657
>>62078345
If everything wasn’t irrevocably fucked like it has been for the past 7 years then I would be kinda blackpilled. But everything is fucked and they are clearly re-working the system and clearly we all know Link is the backbone of it. And everything else is currently fake and gay with respect to the economy and investing in anything else, so it isn’t even that big of a deal that Link hasn’t mooned yet.

62080665
>>62078382
>The only bull case for LINK at this point is a globohomo one world government taking over with Sergei as the leader and if that happens the only thing you'll be able to spend your LINK on anyway is whether you want to buy gooified soi protein or upgrade to a bug-based protein slurry.

I mean that’s the point of owning Link. That we will own something so valuable maybe we will be above the riffraff.

62080931
>>62078134
lot of niggers in TN. where are you from?

62080975
>>62080931
I live in CT right now. A white town. I have considered that moving to TN, NC, SC, and some other states come with nogs. I've been using spotcrime to scope out the areas and googling "racial demographics of 'x'" to get as white as possible.

62080981
>>62080975
i live in niggerhell georgia but there are white towns in every state I believe so its probably not so bad

62081509
>>62078088
I would honestly alternate days of link into QNT and CC (buy on Uphold, not the fake coinbase one, make sure you are buying the real one) and days of XLM with days of XDC. And I would split your BTC into half XRP. Go back and forth each day, so
Day 1: $2 BTC,XRP $1 Link,XLM.
Day 2: $2 BTC,XRP $1 QNT,XDC
Day 3: $2 BTC,XRP $1 CC,XLM
Day 4: ...

You could consider HBAR and SUI. I would do HBAR, possibly mixing the $2 BTC every other day into:
Day 1: $2 BTC,XRP $1 Link,XLM.
Day 2: $2 HBAR,XRP $1 QNT,XDC
Day 3: $2 BTC,XRP $1 CC,XLM
Day 4: ...

Up to you, either way good luck and God bless you and I will pray for you and your older pup and love that you love them. Elder dogs have a lot of love and play in them and do not get the love and time they deserve often.

62081514
>>62081509
Additionally: We are very seemingly approachign an everything bubble crash. If this happens, all things else aside without extreme adoption that would make you very wealthy, crypto will likely sell off harder than anything. BUY THE CRASH HARD. Eat cheaply for a few months and stock up. You will likely not get another opportunity like it.

62081517
>>62081509
It looks like Kraken sells CC. Use Kraken Pro or whatever to cut down on fees. I just remembered buying such a low dollar value at a time of XDC or CC on Uphold would be undoable due to the fees exceeding the amount purchased at that level. XDC can be bought very cheaply on binance.us but I would not leave it on exchange and would transfer it to your own wallet or to Uphold to hold .

item.title: AYE BRUH THEY REALLY WILDING OUT HERE. 6% AND F R E E F A L L I N G. KEK XINJING IN TOTAL DISARRAY SHAMBLES. WHAT THE FU… — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
AYE BRUH THEY REALLY WILDING OUT HERE. 6% AND F R E E F A L L I N G. KEK XINJING IN TOTAL DISARRAY SHAMBLES. WHAT THE FU…

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-04-06 09:06 UTC

OP

AYE BRUH THEY REALLY WILDING OUT HERE. 6% AND F R E E F A L L I N G.
KEK XINJING IN TOTAL DISARRAY SHAMBLES.
WHAT THE FUCK!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62081522
>>62081347
China's monetary policy revolves around suppressing the value of the Yuan, you brainlet. they're an export economy

62081548
>>62081347
Is this what the end of the dollar looks like?

62081562
this is bullish and will lead to more countries using it to pay for oil

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081567
>>62081522
Yes, that's why USD -> RMB falling is bad for them. Less USD per RMB makes the yuan stronger.

62076065

62078514

62079247
>>62063322
shrug

62079254
I'm gonna.... I'm gonna...
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62081274
>>62063322
KABOOOOOOOOOOOM

62081279
CLICK CLICK

62081307

>diet XLM

62081487

The fact the original made you SO mad you created this to try to clapback will never not be the funniest thing of all time. Brad and David mog Sirgay. Sorry, it's just true.

item.title: I am selling Nintendo Switch games and I wanna know if the prices I am putting on them are fair. — 13 replies — 11.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
I am selling Nintendo Switch games and I wanna know if the prices I am putting on them are fair.

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-04-06 08:09 UTC

OP

I am selling Nintendo Switch games and I wanna know if the prices I am putting on them are fair.
Here's a list of Nintendo Switch games i'm selling.
>Mario + Rabbids Kingdom Battle & Sparks Of Hope Bundle for $90 CAD
>SpongeBob SquarePants Battle For Bikini Bottom Rehydrated for $50 CAD
>Monster Hunter Generations Ultimate for $50 CAD
>Assassin's Creed III Remastered (Includes Assassin's Creed Liberation.) for $50 CAD
>Tales Of Symphonia Remastered for $45 CAD
>Valkyria Chronicles 4 for $45 CAD
>Puyo Puyo Tetris for $45 CAD
>God Eater 3 for $45 CAD
>The World Ends With YouFinal Remix for $45 CAD
>No More Hero Travis Strikes Again for $45 CAD
How can i successfully sell these games?
Any and all helpful advice is welcomed and appreciated.

Early replies (first 3)

62079421
Seems kinda high but i dunno normal CAD prices
completed ebay auctions\facebook marketplace\local used stores will give you better benchmark than anything /biz/ might say, most likely

62079508
>>62079421
>Seems kinda high but i dunno normal CAD prices
CAD prices are high, for example, in the USA all the $50 games are $35.85. And i make sure to price the games according to the quality and value of them and make sure that they're less expensive than buy a brand new copy a a store, for the most part, i try to keep things as fair as possible and haven't had any issues selling before but this group of games i am having trouble selling.
>completed ebay auctions\facebook marketplace\local used stores will give you better benchmark than anything /biz/ might say, most likely
Thanks! I'll be sure to check them out later.
Speaking of ebay, to get money off of it i have to link up my bank account to it, but my business advisor doesn't trust Trustly.
Do i have to go through them to link up my bank account to my ebay?

62080084
What a dogshit thread

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62080098
>>62080084
At least it's something new. Don't you get tired of the crypto shit, boring smg and boring pmg?

I've resorted to VentPosting and SchizoPosting to get some entertainment on this board.

62080134
>>62079405

Just sell to GME so this bag holders can see their CEO pocket more of their money.

62080149
>>62080134
>GME
Who?

62080415
>>62079405
The Mario rabbids games constantly go on sale for like $5. You’re going to have to compete harder in some of these prices

62080433
Check deku deals, see how often and deeply these games go on sale. I think a lot of them get sales pretty often

62080527
>>62080415
Wait really? I did not know that. Thanks for letting me know.
Wow, that was such a shock to me.
>>62080433
I'll check that out.
Thanks for letting me know.

62080558
>>62080415
>>62080433
>>62080527
Update.
So i looked up all the games on Deku Deal and did price comparisons with my prices to thier data.
Really the only games i should lower the prices of by $10-$20 are SpongeBob, No More Heroes and the Mario + Rabbids bundle.

62081201
>>62079405
>How can i successfully sell these games?
sell them $10 cheaper with free shipping.

62081488
>>62079405
Go on thirdparty seller sites and see what used versions (not new) are priced at. Ask an AI to do so for you and to check multiple sites for the listings that are selling.

62081495
>>62079405
>Rabbids
i hate this shit so much
worse than minions

item.title: Financially Fucked By My Father — 39 replies — 51.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Financially Fucked By My Father

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-04-06 08:34 UTC

OP

My dad has no life insurance. Still owes $75k on the mortgage with 8 years to go. He only has $5k in the bank and $5k in his 401k at 63 years old.

He doesn't do ANY maintenance on the house. The basement hasn't had a dehumidifier in it for 7 years and it's full of rat shit and probably mold. The roof is overdue by 2 years and it'll cost about $20k for a new roof. Water collects around the foundation of the house when it rains and he doesn't do anything about it. The water filters need to be changed twice a month, but he only does it once a month, so there's rust in both bathrooms. The master bathroom bathtub drain leaks into the basement and he hasn't fixed it in 4 years, so he just showers in the other bathroom. The kitchen sink leaks water. The fridge is brown from dirt and grime. The stove is covered in dirt and grime. The microwave above the stove is broken, so he has a separate microwave on the counter. The carpet is 20 years old and destroyed. The laminate flooring is peeling away. The window sills are bubbled and peeled from water damage. The furnace is 20 years old. The garage has no electricity running to it and the garage door is broken. He doesn't even fix that when he used to install and repair garage doors as a job for 30 years. There are cobwebs in the living areas. The porches are falling apart and it's a tripping hazard every time you walk up the stairs.

All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn.

Having a parent that is lazy, financially retarded and unhygienic will screw you over when it comes to owning and maintaining a home. I refuse to put $100k into the house to make it enjoyable to live in, especially when he's still living there.

My mom is awesome though and she lives with me.

Are you in the same situation, or did you get lucky enough to have intelligent, hardworking parents that actually care about your future finances?

Early replies (first 3)

62078756
>>62078722
so sound like a faggot

62078808
>insure house alot
>fire
>profit

62078820
>>62078722
Not really seeing how your dad's financial issues affect you at all though, much less how you are "financially fucked" by this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078968
>>62078870
Your dad doesn't owe you generational wealth though. His failure to gift you millions of dollars does not in any way constitute "fucking you over financially". It is his house, to do with as he pleases, and until and unless he wills it to you, it is of no business to you, you entitled little shit.

62079025
>>62078968
So true king, fuck family they dont deserve shit from you.

62079045
>>62079025
Not once they hit 18 they don't. Also I don't know if you were intending to come across like a whiny little bitch, but you did an excellent job of it.

62079085
>>62078870
I feel bad for people who fall for this meme, nothing lasts. Unless you're a tech lord that money will probably be gone in one or two generations, even if you're a tech lord. Caring what your father has is peak beta shit.

62079105
>>62079045
I did intend to come off as a whiny bitch, I talk like that and act like that and I look like a whiny little bitch.

62079725
at least you weren't literally fucked by your father like me

62079728
>>62078722
fuck off retard. its his money and his life. he can do with HIS property what he wants. you are entitled to NOTHING. I would burn my house down to the ground if I had a son like you.

62079785
>>62078891
You were retarded to post in a community like this, but only because you've been gaslit into thinking Reddit or literally any other place is worse than
>here
Go start the "gEneRaTioNaL wEaLtH" with your own offspring instead, you can use your dad as a lesson for your kids as to why it sounded like a good thing

62079787
>>62079105
bro
you got schooled take the L and get the fuck outta here

62079795
>>62078722
Well the house and move with your father to the Philippines, have his last years on this earth getting some pussy and drinking having fun.

62079915
>>62079725
My best friend growing up was rated by his step-father and was a diagnosed schizophrenic. He was actually a really smart and cool dude. Ended up being pretty productive and didn't even take drugs for his schizophrenia.

62079923
>>62079785
Sometimes I just like to vent anonymously. All of these replies were expected.

62080217
>>62079045
>Not once they hit 18 they don't.
where do you get the idea that 18 is some magic number where your children are totally prepared for the world?

62080252
>>62079915
...what was the rating?

62080670
Sometimes parents show you how not to live.

My parents were divorced (multiple times each), and had zero financial ability. Total spendthrifts and forever renters.

I was the one who finally put a down payment on a house for my mom.

My concern right now is making sure my kids don't get too _much_ of an inheritance. It will make them soft and deprive them of accomplishment.

62080727
>>62078722
I got super lucky my dad worked his ass off and made it he’s rich as fuck now and I’m very lucky to be his son.

62080770
>>62080252
hnnggthatstiight/10

62081239
>>62080670
>My concern right now is making sure my kids don't get too _much_ of an inheritance. It will make them soft and deprive them of accomplishment.

Give them responsibilities from young, help them get jobs in HS and give them a place in society. Problem solved. People think just having a kid live in a comfy house is enough, but you have to INSTRUCT the kid and guide him. Foster wisdom through experiences and reflection (explaining to the kid why you do the things you do).

62081248
>>62078722
Why don't you help him fix important stuff on the house? One day It'll be yours.

62081353
>>62078942
Stop bitching, my aunt stole my entire inheritance and ran it into the ground/spent it before our lawsuit could get a judgement. I feel bad for my dad but he was able to build everything back for himself and taught me how to make money by making me do it myself just like his dad. If you’re upset enough that it bothers you just know that making money is easy but it’s very slow. You may think $100 here and there is beneath you but if you scale it right after making that 1,000 times you are onto something. Then it compounds and grows from there and eventually it’s $500 a pop before you know it. I would sell things in bulk, or flip things. And I’m talking anything you can get cheap. I did coins, antiques, and furniture first, now I’m doing properties. It’s basically the same business model as selling drugs but you have to factor in taxes and shipping/misc expenses.

62081399
>>62078722
Did be at least buy you a home before fucking you?

62081401
>>62078854
The only thing more based is he wrenched on classic cars and played Quake 3

62081408
arent mutts houses made of plywood?

so this house is worthless anyway, just destroy it and sell the land when he dies

fucking faggot

62081418
My boomers parent are just hard wired to scam me into living the ideal real life.

62081433
>>62080252
Life in prison/10

62081434
>>62080727
Based!

62081439
>>62081248
He doesn't do any maintenance and I don't live there. Even if I did the basement, foundation and roof (which are the current priorities) he wouldn't maintain any of it. I'd rather just invest the cash in a brokerage and have liquidity instead of dumping into an asset where I can't access it unless I sell the property. And on average, only 70% of the cash used to renovate and repair a home goes into the equity of the house, at least according to the interest. So, if you dump $100k into repairing and renovating a home, you'll only increase the equity by about $70k.

62081480
>>62078968
yeah, i can tell you got kicked out of your parents house at 18 and actually bought their excuse huh? sorry your parents don't love you anon, that really sucks.

My parents are currently restoring their house for generational use when they die, fancy new backyard and everything.

62081481
>>62079915
my mum never took anything for her schizo until she had a total breakdown in her early 60s, now she's a bit of a zombie on the drugs, she was 'okay' prior to all that, but yeah. It sucks, hope your friend can keep it together long term.

Stay away from vaccines.

62081523
>>62081481
Thank you man.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 255 replies — 35.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 255 • Updated: 2026-04-06 02:13 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62060621
100$ end of the FUCKING bull run. Here's some influential and intellectual insights

62060648
>>62060540
How do you know. Besides the intent of you making this thread was to educate/shill/ influence the mass retards on this site, don't try to convince me otherwise

62062169
>>62060648
>How do you know.
What do you mean by that? How do I know what?

62062500
>>62060648
How I know that people are unique little programs and that I need to input unique inputs to get the desired outputs? Is that what you're asking or?

62062550
Let me "influence" you young Vishnus of the MINDchain. Listen to one of our spiritual leaders Oliver Talé-Yaźdi how he talks about the Vishnu mindchain. Join our cult *kmh* *kmh* web3 organization where we talk about the new world order.

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2039256751346700502

62065568
100$ end of MIND RUN

62068446
12 more hours and the thread will be alive for 30 days and that's when Gavin Wood gives me 11.5k DOT for my "influencing" of your young Vishnus of the mindchain.

62068604
i buy this shit at 6.6$ or -75% from ATH
NOW I M AT -90% DOWN

62068658
>>62068604
yeah the decline of this shit has been remarkable. and it still somehow has a $2 billion market cap.

62069192
>>62068658
im very disappointed

62069282
>>62069192
Good. Now sell so I can GIGA short it some more while shilling it on 4chan. You activated my trap card anon "Backstabbing shill" (Effect: Convince people DOT is THE SOLUTION while having a giga short open at the same time).

62071796
100$ end of bull run. And it's official, the thread has stayed alive for 30 days and therefore Gavin Wood will pay me 11.5k$. That will feed Mumbai for literally a whole year.

Thank you Vishnu

62072073
>>62071796
You're welcome.

Don't I get a little something

62073144
>>62072073
But of course Panjali, your are a citizen of Mumbai city, the city of DOT. Every citizen gets paid. We all get feed and loved by our kind lord Gavin Wood. He is the underworld CP kingpin. He sells Cheese Pizza and then redistributes the funds among DOT holders. Everyone in Mumbai is eating and licking Cheese Pizza. I also like to put some cream onto my Cheese Pizza and then lick it off.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62075463
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62077075
Every day after the 30th day I get 150 DOT as a bonus. If we keep the thread alive for 30 more days I'll get 30 * 150 = 4500 more DOT. Please help contribute so my village of Mumbai gets feed.

62078039
>>62077075
You are not in India

62078216
>>62078039
This is my hand >>62008295 young Vishnu. This was taken directly from Mumbai, the city of DOT.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62078593
Dont selling my dotty anymore

62078595
75

62078631
Depressing thread

62078789
>>62078216
Fake

62079572
>>62078631
Well, I've already got my 11.5k DOT that Gaving promised me and every day this thread stay alive I get an additional 150DOT. Doesn't really seem depressing to me

>>62078593
>>62078595
100$ END OF BULL RUN

>>62078789
I am brown as chocolate itself. I am a true Mumbai warrior

Thank you for keeping the thread alive my Mumbai warriors. You are feeding your village. This is a cooperative effort. The mumbai boys strike AGAIN


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079598
This is the most damaging thread for dot in history

62079614
>>62079598
Read this >>62069282. We're playing this whole board. They're eating right out of our hands. First we make them believe that DOT is held by the GLAMOROUS citizens of Mumbai. Then at the same time we pocket the money from Gavin Wood for keeping the thread alive. AND at the same time we SHORT IT TO 0$. The whole city of Mumbai is in on it. INDIA SUPER POWER BY 2020 wasn't a lie. It's a FACT for 6 years already.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079649
>>62079614
But is the tech good?

62079750
>>62079649
Literally THE BEST chain currently. And no, I'm not just making shit up. It literally does what everyone else is trying to do. Once JAM + NOMT hit it'll be able to do MILLIONS of TPS (not just value tx) while doing continous compute, while being 100% decentalized, while the tx will be CHEAP, while having NATIVE interoperability, while being able to control other chains and never leave DOT, ... This projects is THE project and people are still buying meme coins. It's UNFATHOMABLE.

62080914
I hope you guys smell the bottom. I can smell the bottom of the Vishnu mindchain. I hope you're going in HARD and DEEP. I hope you guys are PENETRATING THE BOTTOM of the market. I hope you're bouncing up and down on that bottom. I hope you're eating that bottom out and scooping it up. Mmmm, that delicious Vishnu bottom. It has a great taste inside my mouth. I hope you guys are enjoying it as much as I am. I'll leave some cream for you so it tastes even better.

62080937
>>62079649
DOT is literally the most superior blockchain out there. Everything that other people promise and don't deliver DOT already has. Everything that other people lie about and can't do DOT can do. The really BIG upgrade we're waiting on is JAM and NOMT this year
Read more here >>62026407 and >>62056612 and >>62056570. NOMT + JAM scale the network to more a few million or maybe 10-20m TPS. We currently have the highest recorded TPS on a live network (https://data.parity.io/spammening). 143.3k TPS on a live network (NOT TEST NET BULLSHITERY like the other chains are showcasing). This was done one 23 of the 100 cores that are available. So this was only 23% of the full capacity. Some cores are already sold to other chains therefore we can't do a full test. But you can guesstimate the numbers, right? And since the last spammening the throughput has gone up. We could now probably do like 250k TPS from 23 cores or something like that. Just look at the "Performance Charts" on the page I linked. The fees were literally almost always below 0.05$. The fees were around 0.03 to 0.015$ even when the network handled 140k TPS. Do you remember how Solana halted the network literally 8x due to it being congested and shit like that? That can't happen on DOT. The average finality was 16.58s. The thing is though, we'll soon be getting 500ms blocks. When the tests were conducted the block times were still 12s? Now they're 6s and soon they'll be 500ms (Basti blocks). A lot is happening on DOT this year!
Also if you look at the stats the network has been growing over time https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily

62080949
>>62079649
Also combine that with the new tokenomics and the long term vision for the project... I really don't see this project becoming irrelevant to be honest. It simply JUST FUCKING DOES WHAT IT'S SUPPOSED TO DO. The other L2s are behind and they won't catch up ever in my opinion. Once JAM hits DOT will be AT LEAST 5 to 10 years ahead of all the major L2s and L1s. It's not even comparable to be honest. People are blind to not see it. Sooner or later people will wake up and realize "OMG, I've been a degenerate memecoin gambler while I could buy the Vishnu of the blockchain".
Simply put, this project does what others promise and don't deliver. DOT has already DELIVERED and is DELIVERING even more amazing things that no other chain has and if they do they don't package it like DOT does. Sure ICP has continous compute, but does it have native interoperability and can host L2s and smart contracts and has 500ms block times and is decentralized and has shared security to his L2s and has the best governance system in crypto and has over a few million TPS and has ... and has ... Bro, it's fucking impossible to beat DOT on technical superiority. Some day people will realize that they can't build a new use case on the other chains. That they're LIMITING THEMSELVES by staying on shit like ARB or POL or some other fucking shit like that. A few months back Polkadot Asset Hub launched and people can simply copy paste EVM code to DOT and it'll work. We're currently waiting for this referendum (https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864) to pass in order for Uniswap and Safe to launch on Asset Hub. Other major projects will probably follow. Should pass any day now. Slow and steady wins the race

62080475

62080487

your novel sounds gay as hell

62080516
>>62080353
The boomers in my office LOVE it. It's hilarious. "y'know what, I just like showing up. I'd get too distracted at home heh". Meanwhile, they watch the news on a second monitor for like 7 hours a day and take a long lunch with their buddies. When they die off, hopefully we can get out of the slave cage. This isn't a fucking Ford factory. We don't even need 40 hours a week to get shit done.

62080829
>>62080516
Then you only need 20 hours of pay. You little pussies deserve to be replaced.

62080836
>>62080829
>You little pussies deserve to be replaced.
And I'm just the one who's going to do it

62080839
>>62080829

62080878
>>62080516
Its because Boomers hate their families and need an excuse to leave the house.

62080924
>>62080322

62080926
>>62080829
No jeets allowed in my thread, go feed the village saar.

62080928
>>62080475
kill yourself, also, re-read it the text, and then kill yourself again.

62080959
>>62080928
>>62080924

This nigga was beyond correct

62081450
>>62080322
>Seeing your second family
no amount of shilling would make that slave farm my second family

62081458
>>62081450
You actually spend more time with co-workers then your actual family. LMFAO.

62081500
>>62080353
I haven't met anyone who disliked WFH. Sure, some missed the office in the middle of covid, but that's about that.

62081505
>>62080516
Long before they "die off", there won't be any work. Two years, then automated capital investment to business execution, highest position minimum wage. 15 years to total robot. Ladder's up.

62081534
>>62081458
nah i quit few years ago, never going back

62076916

62077003
>>62076917

62077004
>>62076906

62077597

62078193

62078275
>>62076912

62078370

62078379

62078435
>>62076906
> Glory be to GOD!
wtf?

62078979
>>62078435

62079026

62079077

62079081
>>62079026

62079387
>>62079026

62079681
>>62079026

62079710
>>62076906

62079718
>>62076906
So fucking tiresome. I’m long oil over this weekend and fully expect to lose money somehow. It’s insane

62079908

62079921
>>62079908

62081203
>>62076906

62081233

OP

Its literally over for stinkers.

Ripple Treasury is officially attending Swift Sibos 2026. While the world talks about the future of finance, Ripple is building it. Ripple will be showcasing how XRP and Ripple are transforming global liquidity.

BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!

62063538

62063544

62063629

62066692

oh it feels me with sooo much sexual pleasure when that happens :}

62066790

This meme was made with indian hands

62066826
>>62063231

Payment abstraction ? 0
The reserve ? Under water
CCIP ? Taco stand revenue
Shills fishy, clg? Rattled, impotent and seething
Linkies? Disgruntled, sucked dry, lashing out
Their memes? Like their investment, futile and worthless

62071087
>>62063231

62072358
>>62062758

62072601

62072753

62072762

item.title: It’s all falling apart — 128 replies — 8.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
It’s all falling apart

Open thread • Replies: 128 • Updated: 2026-04-05 18:39 UTC

OP

At the same time. Bonds dumping, oil spiking, equities crashing

Trump is gonna go down as a worse version of Hoover + LBJ lol

Early replies (first 3)

62068038
>>>/pol/
Trump is not a king
Neither is he responsible for 80 years of BoomerX fuck ups

62068047
>>62068035
it's over

62068065
>>62068038

But he is the closest American president to a king, and the reason we are in this shitshow now. Spiking oil from 60 to 120 in a month is going to rally yields which are going to tighten financial conditions across the country

Tariffs are managed by the legislative, not the executive, but they didn’t stop king Cheeto from wasting a year and dumping markets 20% for being wrong

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62070088
>>62068437
Amen

62070189
>>62069671

bootlickers like this suck the best cock

62070263
>>62070189
[shill blank]
lol

62070285
The AOC 49 state sweep is going to be a brutal redpill for this country.

62070374
>>62070285
Just because the right is mad at Trump does not mean that they're suddenly going to vote for democrats.

62070388
>>62070374
correct. That's the funny part about demrat shills. They are currently dumping Billions in dollars into eroding the trust in the "state" on such a fundamental level and expecting for some reason that it is going to give them voter potential, when in fact it is just priming the population to go complete 1789 on the entire polity, no matter what flag they fly

62070448
>>62068035
that was always the point, distracting you with manufactured culture wars and financed talking heads while the establishment pulls the plug amidst managed chaos

thanks for playing

62071104
>>62068148
>tariffs (power of purse to congress)
delegated to the president centuries ago
>Iran war (power to declare war to congress)
Delegated to the president nearly a century ago, but the Iraq war involves the Navy and Air Forces, neither of which have ever been subject to congressional declarations of war. The first two barbary wars were fought by the US Navy without a declaration of war by congress, and literally no peeps were made about their constitutionality *by the people who wrote the constitution*. So fuck off with your bullshit.
>threatens to sue political opponents
Oh no not the president that was literally sued by his political opponents! How very gauche of him.
>threatens to sue federal reserve for not lowering rates like we are some 3rd world shithole like turkey
The federal reserve is a patently unconstitutional breach of constutitional executive authority. He should just shut it down.
>fights Supreme Court on tariffs and refuses to refund despite them saying he’s wrong
Separation of powers, bitch. The USSC is not a superior branch to the Administrative.
>uses his military police to literally kill American citizens (ICE)
Oh no police have never killed american citizens before. Perhaps they shouldn't have attempted to murder the ICE officers.
>Donald J. Trump signed 252 Executive orders between 2025 and 2026.
So you're seriously claiming that the president cannot direct the operations of his own executive branch? Because that's what an executive order is, it's an order to the executive branch. That's all it is. It isn't legislation, and you're a fucking retard for thinking it is, or you are just being a lying piece of shit who thinks we are all fucking retards that will fall for it.

62071127
>>62068374
The terms of Article 5 are satisfied by hopes and prayers and warm thoughts. Nobody would care if Estonia did it, but if the US does it then NATO effectively ceases to exist. Oh the piece of paper that the treaty is written on would still exist, and the French and Germans would parade around with their 6 working tanks and half an infantry division between them, for all anybody cares.

62071151
>>62068035
it's just money. they've got a money printer they use regularly for this.

62071160
>>62070448
absolutely. boomer wealth was always going to be fleeced. always.

62071162
>>62070374
They won't vote Democrat. They will vote AOC 2028

62071169
>>62068035
ever!
impossible!
earth shattering!
people asking for their money back is a revolution on par with spitting of the atom.

62071178
>>62071162
Go back to to your shitcord /tv/ clown shill

62071284
>>62068038
Trump was born in 1946 and has been fucking up our society since the beginning with the rest of the boomers. 1946 is the literal leading edge of the boomer generation, retard.

62071296
>>62071162
Unironically Tulsi 2028 if she ends up getting fired.

62071370
>>62071284
Sure, he is a Boomer, and that qualifies him to hang on the same noose BUT it does not mean that the rest of the BoomerX and more important the rest of the polity, bureaucracy, subsidized privates, bankers.... can hide behind him and memory hole themselves out of their guilt. He is not the scapegoat alone, that goes to everyone over 50 in the political sphere and close to it over the past 70 years, no exceptions

62072176
if you actually have any conviction try shorting blue owl, i’ll be happy to have you pay my dividend in may with your WORTHLESS short position.

62072205
>>62068713
>left liberal communist
schizo word salad

62072344
>>62068038
>BoomerX

Is it just the one guy pushing this term?

62073037
>>62068065
>the closest American president to a king
That had been Obama so far by a margin.

62073045
>>62068038
Trump is a boomer and his love for Israel has put the final nail in the US coffin

62075826
>>62068035
good.

62076650
>>62073037
Your png says that was bush jr not Obama, you fucking idiot

62076688
>>62072344
I think so.

62079321
>>62068148
So he's had fewer executive orders than his predecessors.
252 is smaller than 291 or 277

62079332
>>62069197
I thought Trump left COVID response to the individual states. So the lockdowns were more strict in New York and California then they were in Florida and Texas. And it was the governors of these states deciding the policies.

62079340
>>62068035
Am I safe in USDC?

62079733
>>62079332
>Trump left COVID response to the individual states.
He actually had no choice in the matter. He wanted the dems to open up hence he was screaming about the economy and opening up every day.

62079745
>>62073037
>Donny made 252 executive orders on his second term, in a fucking year. That totals to 472 while still having 3 years left (potentially if he survives)
